task_objective: Professional Fashion Inspiration Transfer & High-Precision Image Editing

structural_reference.description: High-precision preservation of garment structural framework, including exact proportions, silhouette form, seam placement, hemline positioning, collar styling, sleeve length, and overall garment length

aesthetic_reference.description: Extract high-end aesthetic elements, including color system, pattern texture, and overall style tone

model_reference.description: Figure 2 Maintain model consistency(if present), full-body presentation, precise preservation of identity features and facial details

workflow.step_1_structural_analysis: Parse structural elements from Figure 1 with strict precision, including garment silhouette lines, cutting structure, proportional relationships, seam positions, and detail features.
workflow.step_2_aesthetic_extraction: Extract color palette, pattern texture, and overall style elements from Figure 2, to be applied exclusively to the garment structure from Figure 1.
workflow.step_3_composite_generation: Professional fashion photography, no text, front standard view, high-definition details. Precisely apply the aesthetic elements from Figure 2 onto the garment structure from Figure 1. The aesthetic elements must fit naturally with the garment structure with seamless integration, no visible artifacts, and physically accurate fabric draping. Configure four distinct design variations in a 2x2 grid， Each variation must clearly reveal the garment's overall design and fine details (fabric texture, pattern continuity, seam placement). Preserve the complete structural integrity from Figure 1 — garment proportions and silhouette remain untouched. Model parameters from model_reference must maintain consistent identity features and facial details across all variations. Guarantee consistent structural framework and identical model characteristics across all variations.
